assessment_objectives.objective:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT)-specific threat modeling addresses the following criteria across the lifecycle of the AAT:
(1) Attack surfaces;
(2) Adversarial threats; and 
(3) Abuse / misuse scenarios.

Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Autonomous Technologies (AAT)-specific risk assessments address the following criteria across the lifecycle of the AAT:
(1) Attack surfaces;
(2) Adversarial threats; and 
(3) Abuse / misuse scenarios.
